channel.title: Linux on Maddiemightcry
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on Maddiemightcry

item.title: Stow - An amazing tool for dotfiles
item.description:
Introduction

So today i was thinking about backing up my dotfiles. I am going to be using linux at my job so i needed an easy way of getting my system up and running. That is when I discovered an amazing tool, GNU stow.

What is GNU stow?

GNU stow is a symlink farmmanager gnu.org. In simpler terms this means it is an easy way of setting up symlinks. This makes it possible to have one folder with all your dotfiles, and with one command you can link them all to the right places on your system.
